messaging.npcCountHelper: Choose how many clones of this role should appear in SwarmDesk (0-5).
messaging.npcColorHelper: Used for the NPC body glow and sidebar identity color.
messaging.npcRoleHelper: Shown above the NPC in SwarmDesk. Leave blank to use the display label.
messaging.npcPersonalityHelper: Controls the default vibe and fallback dialogue for this NPC.

complete.message: Welcome to the canopy! You're ready to swing through the trees and harvest some sweet success. Go bananas!

welcome.title: Welcome to the Jungle
welcome.description: Inventorium is your primate-powered task management and project visualization platform.
welcome.subtitle: Let's swing through the vines to help you get started.

projects-overview.title: Banana Stands
projects-overview.description: Organize your banana tasks into stands for better jungle management and fruit visualization.
projects-overview.hint: 🍌 Jungle Wisdom: Every banana can belong to a stand

create-project.title: Plant Your First Tree
create-project.description: Let's plant a tree project to organize your forage. Trees help you group related bananas together.
create-project.step1: Click the floating '+' banana in the bottom right corner
create-project.step2: Select the 'Tree Branch' tab in the dialog
create-project.step3: Enter a unique tree name (lowercase with hyphens, e.g., 'my-first-banana-tree')
create-project.step4: Add a display name and jungle description
create-project.hint: Tip: Tree names must be unique and use lowercase letters with hyphens

add-todo.title: Add Banana to Your Tree
add-todo.description: Now let's add a banana task to your tree. These are the fruits you need to harvest.
add-todo.step2: Select the 'Swing Task' tab in the dialog
add-todo.step4: Select your tree from the dropdown
add-todo.hint: Tip: You can plant tasks from anywhere in the jungle using the '+' button

configure-ai.title: Train Your Banana AI Helper
configure-ai.description: Get more bananas by connecting to a smart helper like Google Gemini or OpenAI.

benefits.analyze: Find patterns in your banana trees

configure-ai.statusConfigured: Status: ✅ AI helper is trained and ready!
configure-ai.helpText: You can train your AI helper anytime from Settings → AI Configuration

ai-assistant.title: Banana AI Helper
ai-assistant.description: Get help from your banana AI to manage fruit, analyze jungle patterns, and boost monkey productivity.
ai-assistant.hint: 🍌 Jungle Wisdom: Click the chat banana to start swinging

swarmdesk.title: 3D Banana Jungle
swarmdesk.description: Explore your codebase in 3D banana vision - an immersive fruit visualization tool.
swarmdesk.hint: 🍌 Jungle Wisdom: Access the jungle from banana stand view
swarmdesk.tabTip: Once the jungle loads, press TAB to swing between your control tree and the 3D banana workspace

complete.title: You're All Peeled!
complete.description: You're ready to start using the banana jungle. Explore the fruit and make it your own.
complete.footer: 🍌 You can replay this banana tour anytime from the Fruit Stand

analytics.futureHint: Future enhancements: Custom date ranges, CSV export, real-time updates, cohort analysis, and predictive insights powered by the madness of banana science!

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

instructions.title: How to use:
instructions.step1: Install the UML generator: npm install -g @madnessengineering/uml-generator
instructions.step2: Generate UML from your codebase: uml-generator /path/to/project -o project-uml.json
instructions.step3: Upload the generated JSON file using the button above
